# Pikchr 1.0.0

Vendored generated amalgamation from the official Pikchr `version-1.0.0`
release:

https://pikchr.org/home/tarball/pikchr-1.0.0.tar.gz?r=version-1.0.0

The upstream project distributes Pikchr under the zero-clause BSD license.
The generated files are kept unchanged.
